tags.name: `mc-modal`
tags.description:
Purpose: Modal dialog to display content that requires user interaction
Category: Content Display, Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to capture user input or display important information.
When not to use: When you need to display a large amount of content or complex layouts.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-checkbox, mc-date-range, mc-input-date, mc-input-time, mc-input, mc-multi-select, mc-number-stepper, mc-radio, mc-select-native, mc-select, mc-switch, mc-textarea, mc-typeahead-multi-select, mc-typeahead
Alternative component names: Dialog, Lightbox, Popup, Alert, Confirmation

Events:

  * `closed` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closed event gets dispatched once the modal is closed.

  * `closing` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closing event gets dispatched once the modal is closing.

  * `opened` {`CustomEvent`} - The opened event gets dispatched once the modal is opened.

  * `opening` {`CustomEvent`} - The opening event gets dispatched once the modal is opening.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - The click event gets dispatched when clicked on the primaryAction/secondaryAction button within a modal.

Slots:

  * ``default`` {} - The body HTML to use for the modal.

  * ``primaryAction`` {} - The primaryAction HTML to use for the modal. Could be used for i.e. custom confirm/cancel buttons.

  * ``secondaryAction`` {} - The secondaryAction HTML to use for the modal. Could be used for i.e. custom confirm/cancel buttons.

  * ``footer`` {} - A slot for additional content to be placed in the footer. Could be used for i.e. instructions or disclaimer

Attributes:

  * `entercloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `backdropcloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - This attribute should be added only if clicking on the backdrop (scrim) must not close the modal.

  * `hiddenclose` {`boolean`} - This attribute should be added only if you want to disable default close button.

  * `padding` {`Padding`} - Padding of the content and title in modal.

Properties:

  * `entercloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `dimension` {`Dimension | undefined`} - dimension of the modal.

  * `fit` {`Fit | undefined`} - Fit of the modal.

  * `backdropcloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - This attribute should be added only if clicking on the backdrop (scrim) must not close the modal.

  * `escapecloseactiondisabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - This attribute should be added only if pressing the `Escape` must not close the modal.

  * `hiddenclose` {`boolean`} - This attribute should be added only if you want to disable default close button.

  * `padding` {`Padding`} - Padding of the content and title in modal.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Should only be set if two modal are supposed to be shown on top of each other.

  * `width` - Sets the width of the component, otherwise the width of the currently chosen size preset will be used.
Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%` or `vw`, etc.

  * `height` - Sets the height of the component, otherwise the height of the currently chosen size preset will be used.
Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%` or `vw`, etc.

  * `open` {`boolean | undefined`} - Whether the modal should be open.

attributes.name: backdropcloseactiondisabled
attributes.description:
`backdropcloseactiondisabled` {`boolean`} - This attribute should be added only if clicking on the backdrop (scrim) must not close the modal.

Property: backdropcloseactiondisabled

Default: false

attributes.name: hiddenclose
attributes.description:
`hiddenclose` {`boolean`} - This attribute should be added only if you want to disable default close button.

Property: hiddenclose

Default: false

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description:
`padding` {`Padding`} - Padding of the content and title in modal.

Property: padding

Default: default

attributes.name: onclosed
attributes.description: `closed` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closed event gets dispatched once the modal is closed.

attributes.name: onclosing
attributes.description: `closing` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - The closing event gets dispatched once the modal is closing.

attributes.name: onopened
attributes.description: `opened` {`CustomEvent`} - The opened event gets dispatched once the modal is opened.

attributes.name: onopening
attributes.description: `opening` {`CustomEvent`} - The opening event gets dispatched once the modal is opening.

attributes.name: onclick
attributes.description: `click` {`MouseEvent`} - The click event gets dispatched when clicked on the primaryAction/secondaryAction button within a modal.
